Description: Once misplaced, now bound — carries the memory of being sought
Name: lost and found again

Description: Stripped of pretense by long use — nothing left but purpose
Name: worn to the bone

Description: Ownerless and untamed — refuses to serve any single master
Name: claimed by none

Description: Heavy with obligation — the weight of family carried into battle
Name: burden of kin

Description: Promised to the next in line — its power strains toward the future
Name: owed to heir

Description: given up
Name: lost of will

Description: Held through dreamless sleep — crosses the boundary between rest and readiness
Name: carried til waking

Description: Its true name spoken only at night — bound to shadow and silver
Name: named by moonlight

Description: Concealed beneath layers — its power known only to the wearer
Name: hidden beneath

Description: The moment before release — coiled potential, never quite still
Name: held in breath

Description: Seasoned by countless battles — the red has seeped in and stayed
Name: bathed in blood

Description: Its deeds go unrecorded — what it has done, none can say
Name: hushed in secret

Description: Gone so long the world forgot it — returned changed and strange
Name: absent for long

Description: Weathered past the point of breaking — only the true remains
Name: rusted by Dew

Description: Mended with love and quiet ferocity — nothing may break what she kept whole
Name: stitched by a mother

Description: Bears the name of a provider — strength passed through blood and word
Name: named after a father

Description: Seen through young eyes as magnificent — and perhaps it truly is
Name: worshipped by a child

Description: Repaired with careful hands and quiet loyalty — holds together under any strain
Name: mended by a sister

Description: Borne in another's shadow, faithful and uncomplaining
Name: carried by a brother

Description: Held through doubt and silence — belief made tangible
Name: kept in faith

Description: The last gift of the fallen — its power drawn from a final act of will
Name: given by dying hands

Description: Aged beyond expectation — time has only made it more itself
Name: kissed by time

Description: Adored so completely that the love became part of the material
Name: cherished by lovers

Description: Lost from memory, then suddenly vivid — its return feels fated
Name: forgotten and remembered

Description: The storm kept its secret — found only when the weather finally broke
Name: hidden by rain

Description: Wagered and lost, wagered and won — every victory feels borrowed
Name: gambled by debt

Description: Nearly lost so many times its luck has hardened into something useful
Name: remembered by the careless

Description: Balanced on the threshold — between breaking and becoming
Name: cradled on edge

Description: The weight of a wrong never set right — carried forward as fuel
Name: bound by shame
